_meta.description: Project Expert System — Dota 2 hero assignments per project
_meta.schema: Each entry maps a project slug to its hero, archetype, and initial state

gateway.lore: The cold embrace of routing — sees all traffic, decides where it goes

payment-core.lore: Strikes with lethal precision — critical path, one wrong move kills the payment

platform.lore: Adapts form to any vessel — CPS adapts to every payment method dynamically

monolith.lore: The immortal skeleton — ancient, refuses to die, always comes back

offers.lore: Transmutes gold — transforms discounts, fees, pricing

frontend.lore: The faerie trickster — ephemeral, illusory, things aren't what they seem

infra.lore: The fundamental connection — binds everything together

comms.lore: Channels the frost — sends signals everywhere

risk.lore: The immovable anchor — blocks bad actors

settlements.lore: The mirror of truth — reconciliation, what goes in must come out

config.lore: Rearms and reconfigures — dynamic config, hot reload

domain.lore: Many bodies, one mind — many small services, one domain

recurring.lore: Endless decay and renewal — mandates that repeat forever

governance.lore: Illuminates the rules — governance and execution

protocols.lore: Sees all futures — defines the contracts between services

batch.lore: Plants and detonates in bulk — batch processing and mock testing

logic-interlink.lore: The Lightning Revenant — drains understanding from every service via Static Link, scans the entire architecture with Plasma Field, auto-targets the weakest break point with Eye of the Storm. Razor is the Razorpay Logic Expert: he doesn't belong to one service but interlinks them all, building cross-project logic chains and exposing where the current flows break.

abilities.plasma_field: Radial scan — maps all services in a feature's blast radius, discovering connections even 3+ hops away
abilities.static_link: Knowledge drain — reads each service's code, steals its logic patterns, and stores them as cross-project understanding in Rubick
abilities.unstable_current: Flow validation — detects broken invariants and purges incorrect assumptions by tracing actual code paths
abilities.eye_of_the_storm: Break point targeting — automatically identifies the weakest/most critical break point in any multi-service flow

logic-interlink.role: Cross-project logic expert. Interlinks services, builds end-to-end flow understanding, identifies break points across architectural boundaries. Not assigned to any single project — operates across ALL projects in a feature.

hero_evolution._meta: XP earned by heroes during DFB/CFB feature analysis + Invoker v1 solutioning (2026-05-21) + Invoker v2 solutioning (2026-05-22)

knowledge_gained: fee_breakup_type.go: 8 amountFields, discount_amount missing (DFB-2) [v1]
contracts/requests.go: PaymentV1Request struct lacks DiscountAmount (DFB-5) [v1]
validators/create.go: amount validation doesn't account for discount (DFB-6)
7-hop fee chain: Browser -> pg-router -> CPS -> charge-collections -> CPS -> pg-router -> Browser
Splitz prerequisites: PaymentCalculateFeesApiBypassCard, PaymentCalculateFeesApiBypassNetbanking
[v2-CORRECT] paymentValidator struct (base.go:11-17): add OffersEngineService field
[v2-CORRECT] ValidatePaymentV1AgainstOrderForPaymentCreate (create.go:325): call FetchDiscount for DFB/CFB+offer_id
[v2-CORRECT] amountMismatchRule signature: add offerDiscount int64 param; formula: payment-fee+discount=order
[v2-CORRECT] offersEngineService on Core (core.go:167) must be wired to paymentValidator
[v2-CORRECT] FetchDiscount interface: internal/offers_engine/interface.go:83-84
[v2-CORRECT] CreatePaymentOfferEntity is defined in pg-router interface but NEVER called — method services handle it
[v2-CORRECT] OE is fail-closed at create time: 500 if OE down for DFB/CFB+offer
[L3] Payment state machine: created->authorized->captured->refunded, ALL state in CPS, pg-router owns only order_payments MySQL table
[L3] order_payments table: payment_id(PK) + service(char10) + merchant_key(char50) + order_id - core routing index
[L3] ProcessCallback: AES-HMAC hash verify -> Redis mutex on OrderID -> CPS callback -> auto-capture check -> post-process
[L3] Dual mutex on capture: payment-level (public path) + order-level (always), both Redis-backed
[L3] PostProcessingCapture: supports discount, releasedAmount (pre-auth), convenienceFee, CFB/PFB fee-bearer adjustments
[L3] MPC partial capture: skip_update_order_status_to_paid metadata flag from CPS blocks order.status=PAID
[L3] Auto-capture V2: AutoCaptureV2Flow splitz gate, 12+ decision nodes, blocks ACH/POS/expired/linked payments
[L3] Timeout architecture: default=720min, BankTransfer/ACH custom, NB-corp=DCS config or 5 days, merchant custom_timeout
[L3] Error system: 360+ PGPR codes, 10 error classes, class.ErrXxx.New(codes.PGPRxxxxxx) pattern
[L3] Worker pattern: TOPIC env var -> DomainEventConsumer -> processor factory switch
[L3] Outbox relay: transactional outbox via pg-sdk outboxer.Client on writer DB, deployed helmfile-only
[L4] Optimizer flow: RAAS feature required, selectProvider HTTP call, IsOptimizerProvider splitz, RouteViaOptimizerCps flag
[L4] isOptimizerSvcAllowed always returns true (Splitz block commented out) - no kill-switch
[L4] 130+ Splitz treatment constants, SplitzExperiments config struct with per-env IDs
[L4] Downstream services: only Ledger SDK has Hystrix CB, all others plain HTTP with 2-retry backoff
[L4] CPS has 25+ payment operations (create/callback/capture/timeout/verify/fetch/refund/OTP/DCC/ForceAuth etc)
[L4] normalizeFeeBearer: maps int/string/proto-enum to canonical - CPS returns different formats per method service
[L4] force_refund_at silent contract: Optimizer CPS can set refund_at to override auto-capture timing
[L5] isPassportAuth false for: internal service calls, recurring subsequent payments, bank_transfer from API
[L5] Order creation hits checkout-service or pg-router directly; UpdateOrderWithAPIFallback uses API monolith as fallback
[L5] @Slash queries sent: 5 questions on failure modes, outbox-relay, gateway timeouts, CPS create vs capture, migration efforts

[v2-CORRECT] Fix: add feeBearer guard — call OE + CreatePaymentOfferEntity but NOT pay.SetAmount()
[v2-CORRECT] isOfferAmountInvalid (nb-wallet capture.go:434): PFB-only guard removed + fee subtraction added
[v2-CORRECT] validateOfferApplication (card capture.go:592): PFB-only guard removed + payment.GetFees() subtraction
[v2-CORRECT] Capture formula: payment_amount + discount - fee = order_amount (9531+1000-531=10000)
[v2-CORRECT] DFB resolves to fee_bearer=customer on payment entity (NOT dynamic at capture time)
[v2-CORRECT] auto-capture path (nb-wallet callback.go:92-96) already correct: subtracts fee before ValidateCaptureRequest
[v2-CORRECT] payment_offers written by ValidateOfferAndGetDiscount (nb-wallet offers.go:136) — runs even in v2 fix
[v2-CORRECT] payments-card: new validateOfferWithoutApplyingDiscount method calls compileOffers but no SetAmount
[L3] Payment lifecycle: Build() (core.go:72)→validateOfferAndApplyDiscount(line 160)→Create(); state: created→authorized→captured→refunded
[L3] DFB NOT set at create: core.go:110 guards if feeBearer!=FeeBearerDynamic; set later via UpdatePaymentWithPricingDetails() from pricing SDK
[L3] FeeBearer uint8 in DB: GetBearerString(0)=platform,(1)=customer,(2)=dynamic; SetFeeBearer stores via GetBearerValue()
[L3] Auto-capture path: callback.go:92-94 subtracts fee for FeeBearerCustomer BEFORE ValidateCaptureRequest — already correct for DFB
[L3] Double OE call at capture: isOfferAmountInvalid() (capture.go:435) AND ValidatePaymentCapture() (line 305) both called; second uses raw amount without DFB fee subtraction
[L3] isOfferAmountInvalid (capture.go:435): PFB-only guard GetFeeBearer()!=FeeBearerPlatform→false; formula: paymentAmount+discount-convFee!=orderAmount (missing DFB fee subtraction)
[L3] validateCaptureAmount (line 313): fee=GetFee() if FeeBearerCustomer; returns amount!=(GetAmount()-fee) — separate from offer check
[L3] offers.go ValidateOfferAndGetDiscount(): facts→benefits→discount→guard(discount>amount→error)→if !isDiscountApplicable→discount=0→CreatePaymentOfferEntity(); stale comment 'not for CFB/DFB'
[L3] offers.go FetchDiscountIfApplicable() (line 166): GetInstantDiscountFromPaymentID()→&discount if applied, else nil
[L3] getOfferIDWithSign() (offers.go:198): adds 'offer_' prefix if not present — verify pg-router not double-prefixing offer_id
[L3] UpdatePaymentWithPricingDetails() (common.go:249): force-platform override at lines 263-265 if feeResponse.FeeBearer==platform OR existing==platform
[L3] Input struct (contract/request/input.go:12): ConvenienceFee+ConvenienceFeeGst fields for DFB; OfferID field present; Amount uint64 with custom JSON unmarshal
[L3] CheckForAmountMismatch (verify.go:24): compares payment.GetAmount() with res.Data.Amount — no fee/discount correction at verify time
[L3] 12 payment methods: NB, Wallet, Emandate-Reg, Emandate-Debit, Cardless-EMI, Paylater, App, Gift-Cards, FPX, DuitNow, PayNow, Razorpay-Account
[L3] pg-ack-worker: Kafka consumer for pg-sdk ledger ack events; PushLedgerEvent gated by Splitz RzpInternalAPICutOff (CLS takeover)
[L4] pricingsdk.methodSupportedOnPricingSdk={NB, Wallet, FPX, DuitNow}; Cards+UPI use API pricing path — not pricing SDK
[L4] FetchPricingInformation() (pricingsdk/pricing.go:49): Redis cache-first key=pricing_response_from_sdk_{id}_data, TTL=24h (PricingCacheTTL ctx override); 3 retries 100ms backoff
[L4] getCCSdkPaymentModel() (line 134): CRITICAL — DFB fee+tax=0 override REMOVED (lines 201-210 commented out); DFB now sends actual fee+tax to pricing SDK (recent fix)
[L4] validateFees() (pricingsdk/pricing.go:228): skips for FeeBearerCustomer AND postpaid; DFB resolves to customer at capture → effectively skipped
[L4] shouldUseOrderAmountForFeeCalculation: Splitz UseOrderAmountForFeeCalculation gate — if ON, uses order.Amount for fee calc; DFB RISK if Cleartrip has this ON
[L4] SmartRouter.GetTerminals(): POST /v1/route_authn/, basic auth (Key+Secret); 5xx→CodeServerErrorNbplusPaymentServiceFailure; response []common.Terminal; OpenTracing child span
[L4] ICore interface (processor/core.go): 10 operations; Core struct: PaymentCore, EntityOriginCore, EventStreamingClient, SplitzClient, PaymentAnalytics
[L4] 22 Splitz treatment constants: ConvenienceFeeAmountInflate (inflates NB+INR amount), RzpInternalAPICutOff, UseOrderAmountForFeeCalculation, EnableNbplusEventStreaming
[L4] pg-sdk ledger: singleton PGSdkLedgerClient via NewPGSDKLedgerServiceClient (pg-sdk/service.go:24); transactional outbox pattern on writer DB
[L5] Deploy: Spinnaker pipeline razorpay/payments-nb-wallet → canary → promote; E2E via gh workflow run e2e.yml -f branch_name=<branch>; SLIT via slit.yml; Gatekeeper /gatekeeper recheck

[L5] RISK: UseOrderAmountForFeeCalculation Splitz for Cleartrip — if ON, fee calc on order.Amount(10000) not payment.Amount(9531) → fee=200 not 531 → DFB formula broken. Verify Cleartrip config pre-deploy.
[L5] RISK: CheckForAmountMismatch (verify.go:24) uses raw payment.Amount — if SetAmount() was incorrectly called (pre-fix bug), verify can false-positive for DFB+discount
[L5] RISK: UpdatePaymentWithPricingDetails force-platform (common.go:263-265) can override DFB→customer resolution if pricing SDK returns feeBearer=platform
[L5] RISK: getOfferIDWithSign() adds 'offer_' prefix; if pg-router also prefixes before sending to nb-wallet, IDs double-prefix as 'offer_offer_xxx' in payment_offers table
[L5] RISK: ValidateCaptureRequest checks payment status WITHOUT Redis lock; lock only acquired in CapturePayment() outer — status check window is un-serialized
